languages.text: "Настаиваю на отклонении запроса. Аугментация — это священный дар {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}, который требует тщательного контроля и ухода. Ресурсы сектора Бионика исчислимы и ограничены, ввиду чего наше внимание должно фокусироваться на обслуживании центральных жизнеформ экипажа. Нарушение устоявшейся директивы и рассредоточение дара аугментаций по недостойным — растрата, порицаемая Омниссией и едва ли выносимая для техножрецов на борту судна".

traits.locale_text: "Рекомендую отклонить запрос. Аугментация — это священный дар {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}, который требует тщательного контроля и ухода. Ресурсы сектора Бионика исчислимы и ограничены, в виду чего наше внимание должно фокусировать на обслуживании центральных жизнеформ экипажа. Рассредоточение дара аугментаций по недостойным — растрата, порицаемая Омниссией и едва ли выносимая для техножрецов на борту судна".
traits.speaker: Augmentator

languages.text: "I insist upon rejection of the request. Augmentation is a sacred gift of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} that requires careful monitoring and maintenance. The Sector Bionica's resources are finite and, as such, our focus must be on servicing the key life forms among the crew. Violating the established directive and wastefully distributing the gift of augmentations among the unworthy would be an outrage to the Omnissiah and barely tolerated by the Tech-Priests aboard this vessel."

languages.text: 「要求の拒否を推奨する。増幅は全知の神の聖なる贈り物であり、慎重な監視と維持が必要だ。セクター・ビオニカの資源は計算可能で有限であり、そのため、最も重要な乗組員ユニットの整備に注意を集中させる必要がある。増幅の贈り物を不当な者に散らすことは、全知の神にとって無駄であり、この船のテクプリストたちによって許されることではない」
languages.original_text: "Recommending denial of the request. Augmentation is a sacred gift of the Omnissiah that requires careful monitoring and maintenance. The resources of the Sector Bionica are calculable and finite, and as such, our attention must be focused on servicing the most important crew units. Scattering the gift of augmentations among the unworthy is a waste that would be an outrage to the Omnissiah and barely tolerated by the Tech-Priests aboard this vessel."

traits.locale_text: 「要求の拒否を推奨します。増幅は全知の神の聖なる贈り物であり、慎重な監視と維持が必要です。セクター・ビオニカの資源は計算可能で有限であり、そのため、最も重要な乗組員ユニットの整備に注意を集中させる必要があります。増幅の贈り物を不当な者に散らすことは、全知の神にとって無駄であり、この船のテクプリストたちによって許されることではありません。」

languages.text: "Talebin reddedilmesinde ısrar ediyorum. Ogmentasyon; dikkatli izleme ve bakım gerektiren, {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} kutsal bir hediyesidir. Sektör Biyonika'nın kaynakları sınırlıdır. Bu nedenle odak noktamız, mürettebattaki kilit yaşam formlarına hizmet etmek olmalıdır. Yerleşik yönergeyi ihlal etmek ve ogmentasyon armağanını layık olmayanlara müsrifçe dağıtmak, Hermesih'e hakaret etmek olur. Bu gemideki Tekno Rahipler bunu pek hoş karşılamayacaktır."
languages.original_text: "I insist upon rejection of the request. Augmentation is a sacred gift of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} that requires careful monitoring and maintenance. The Sector Bionica's resources are finite and, as such, our focus must be on servicing the key life forms among the crew. Violating the established directive and wastefully distributing the gift of augmentations among the unworthy would be an outrage to the Omnissiah and barely tolerated by the Tech-Priests aboard this vessel."

traits.locale_text: "Talebin reddedilmesinde ısrar ediyorum. Ogmentasyon; dikkatli izleme ve bakım gerektiren, {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} kutsal bir hediyesidir. Sektör Biyonika'nın kaynakları sınırlıdır. Bu nedenle odak noktamız, mürettebattaki kilit yaşam formlarına hizmet etmek olmalıdır. Yerleşik yönergeyi ihlal etmek ve ogmentasyon armağanını layık olmayanlara müsrifçe dağıtmak, Hermesih'e hakaret etmek olur. Bu gemideki Tekno Rahipler bunu pek hoş karşılamayacaktır."

languages.text: «Insisto en denegar la solicitud. Los aumentos son dones sagrados del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} y requieren una monitorización y un mantenimiento cuidadosos. Los recursos del Sector Bionica son finitos y, por tanto, deben dirigirse a servir a las formas de vida más esenciales de la tripulación. Infringir las directrices y desperdiciar el don de los aumentos repartiéndolos entre los indignos enfurecería al Omnissiah y los tecnosacerdotes de la propia nave apenas podrían tolerarlo».
languages.original_text: "I insist upon rejection of the request. Augmentation is a sacred gift of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} that requires careful monitoring and maintenance. The Sector Bionica's resources are finite and, as such, our focus must be on servicing the key life forms among the crew. Violating the established directive and wastefully distributing the gift of augmentations among the unworthy would be an outrage to the Omnissiah and barely tolerated by the Tech-Priests aboard this vessel."

traits.locale_text: «Insisto en denegar la solicitud. Los aumentos son dones sagrados del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} y requieren una monitorización y un mantenimiento cuidadosos. Los recursos del Sector Bionica son finitos y, por tanto, deben dirigirse a servir a las formas de vida más esenciales de la tripulación. Infringir las directrices y desperdiciar el don de los aumentos repartiéndolos entre los indignos enfurecería al Omnissiah y los tecnosacerdotes de la propia nave apenas podrían tolerarlo».

languages.text: “我坚决要求驳回该请求。植入物是{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的神圣恩赐，需要精细的监控与维护。仿生区的资源有限，因此，我们必须优先保障最核心的船员生命体。违反既定指令，将植入物这种恩赐浪费在不配之人身上，是对欧姆尼赛亚的亵渎，本舰上的技术神甫也绝不会容忍此事。”
languages.original_text: "I insist upon rejection of the request. Augmentation is a sacred gift of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} that requires careful monitoring and maintenance. The Sector Bionica's resources are finite and, as such, our focus must be on servicing the key life forms among the crew. Violating the established directive and wastefully distributing the gift of augmentations among the unworthy would be an outrage to the Omnissiah and barely tolerated by the Tech-Priests aboard this vessel."

traits.locale_text: “我坚决要求驳回该请求。植入物是{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的神圣恩赐，需要精细的监控与维护。仿生区的资源有限，因此，我们必须优先保障最核心的船员生命体。违反既定指令，将植入物这种恩赐浪费在不配之人身上，是对欧姆尼赛亚的亵渎，本舰上的技术神甫也绝不会容忍此事。”

languages.text: « N'en faites rien, je vous en conjure. L'augmentation est un don sacré de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} qui nécessite une surveillance rigoureuse et un entretien régulier. Les ressources du secteur Bionica étant limitées, nous devons concentrer notre attention sur les entités primordiales de l'équipage. Enfreindre les directives établies et gaspiller le don de l'augmentation en l'accordant à ceux qui n'en sont pas dignes offenserait l'Omnimessie, et les technoprêtres de ce vaisseau auraient bien du mal à tolérer une telle décision. »
languages.original_text: "I insist upon rejection of the request. Augmentation is a sacred gift of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} that requires careful monitoring and maintenance. The Sector Bionica's resources are finite and, as such, our focus must be on servicing the key life forms among the crew. Violating the established directive and wastefully distributing the gift of augmentations among the unworthy would be an outrage to the Omnissiah and barely tolerated by the Tech-Priests aboard this vessel."

traits.locale_text: « N'en faites rien, je vous en conjure. L'augmentation est un don sacré de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} qui nécessite une surveillance rigoureuse et un entretien régulier. Les ressources du secteur Bionica étant limitées, nous devons concentrer notre attention sur les entités primordiales de l'équipage. Enfreindre les directives établies et gaspiller le don de l'augmentation en l'accordant à ceux qui n'en sont pas dignes offenserait l'Omnimessie, et les technoprêtres de ce vaisseau auraient bien du mal à tolérer une telle décision. »

languages.text: "Ich bestehe darauf, diese Anfrage abzulehnen. Die Augmentation ist eine heilige Gabe des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, die einer sorgfältigen Überwachung und Wartung bedarf. Die Ressourcen des Sektors Bionica sind endlich. Unser Fokus muss daher die Unterstützung der entscheidenden Lebensformen der Crew sein. Die etablierte Direktive zu verletzen und die Gabe der Augmentationen für Unwürdige zu vergeuden, wäre ein Affront gegenüber dem Omnissiah und würde von den Techpriestern an Bord dieses Schiffes wohl kaum toleriert."
languages.original_text: "I insist upon rejection of the request. Augmentation is a sacred gift of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} that requires careful monitoring and maintenance. The Sector Bionica's resources are finite and, as such, our focus must be on servicing the key life forms among the crew. Violating the established directive and wastefully distributing the gift of augmentations among the unworthy would be an outrage to the Omnissiah and barely tolerated by the Tech-Priests aboard this vessel."
